# STRAT.016 ? Christensen's Disruptive Innovation

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Low-end or new market footholds; different value proposition; sustaining vs disruptive; overshooting customers; upmarket movement

## Application
Start at low-end or new market; offer different value; recognize disruption pattern; don't overshoot needs; move upmarket over time

## Key Values
- Low-end entry
- Different value
- Upmarket movement
- Customer job focus
- Pattern recognition

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
